recommendations.title: Evilspeak
recommendations.overview: Bullied by classmates, a pudgy military-school student fights back by computer with the devil.

recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: Dutch
recommendations.overview: To get to know his girlfriend's son, a man volunteers to pick him up from a prep school... only to learn that her son's not the nicest kid.

recommendations.title: Meus 15 Anos: Filme
recommendations.overview: A shy student suddenly becomes the center of attention when she wins a huge birthday party that she never asked for.

recommendations.title: Amateur
recommendations.overview: 14-year-old basketball phenom Terron Forte has to navigate the under-the-table world of amateur athletics when he is recruited to an elite NCAA prep school.

recommendations.title: El Bola
recommendations.overview: El Bola  is a 12-year-old boy raised in a violent and sordid environment. Embarrassed by his family life, he avoids becoming close to classmates. The arrival of a new boy at school changes his attitude towards his classmates and friendship.

recommendations.title: 17 Girls
recommendations.overview: When Camille accidentally becomes pregnant, she encourages her friends and fellow high school classmates to follow suit. It's only a matter of time, before seventeen girls in the high school are pregnant and the town is thrown into a world of chaos.

recommendations.title: Thesis
recommendations.overview: While working on a thesis about audiovisual violence, film student Ángela finds a snuff video where a girl is tortured until death. Soon she discovers that she was a former student in her university, and that the authors of the video are not very far

recommendations.title: School Ties
recommendations.overview: When David Greene receives a football scholarship to a prestigious prep school in the 1950s, he feels pressure to hide the fact that he is Jewish from his classmates and teachers, fearing that they may be anti-Semitic. He quickly becomes the big man

recommendations.title: Toy Soldiers
recommendations.overview: After federal agents arrest a drug czar and put him on trial, the cartel leader's vicious son storms a prep school and takes its students hostage. They rebel against the armed intruders and try to take back their academy by any means necessary.
